types:type.name: subscription
types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
type subscription = {| STATUS_TYPE_ID: Number {"typeId": "int"}, SOURCE_LOCATION: String, DESTINATION_LOCATION: String, FROM_TIME: String, TO_TIME: String, ADVANCE_NOTIFY_TIME_MIN: Number {"typeId": "int"} |} {"example": "{\\\"STATUS_TYPE_ID\\\":1,\\\"SOURCE_LOCATION\\\":\\\"JFK\\\",\\\"DESTINATION_LOCATION\\\":\\\"PAD\\\",\\\"FROM_TIME\\\":\\\"01:12:00\\\",\\\"TO_TIME\\\":\\\"02:12:00\\\",\\\"ADVANCE_NOTIFY_TIME_MIN\\\":33}"}

types:type.name: user
types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
type user = {| USER_ID: String, EMAIL_ID: String, STATUS_TYPE_ID: Number {"typeId": "int"}, FIRST_NAME: String, LAST_NAME: String, PHONE_NUMBER: Number {"typeId": "double"} |} {"example": "{\\\"USER_ID\\\":\\\"9043322111\\\",\\\"EMAIL_ID\\\":\\\"bhuvan123@gmail.com\\\",\\\"STATUS_TYPE_ID\\\":1,\\\"FIRST_NAME\\\":\\\"bhuvan\\\",\\\"LAST_NAME\\\":\\\"babu\\\",\\\"PHONE_NUMBER\\\":7435455444}"}

types:type.name: alert
types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
type alert = {| DELAY_TYPE_FLAG: String, NOTIFICATION_STATUS: String, NOTIFICATION_FAILURE_DETAIL: String, DELAY_TIME: Number {"typeId": "int"} |} {"example": "{\\\"DELAY_TYPE_FLAG\\\":\\\"1\\\",\\\"NOTIFICATION_STATUS\\\":\\\"Sent\\\",\\\"NOTIFICATION_FAILURE_DETAIL\\\":\\\"NA\\\",\\\"DELAY_TIME\\\":1}"}

types:type.name: auto_282f03ad-8c76-40ea-a2d5-b00629aee4f7_Input-Payload
auto_282f03ad-8c76-40ea-a2d5-b00629aee4f7_Input-Attributes
types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
type auto_282f03ad_8c76_40ea_a2d5_b00629aee4f7_Input_Attributes = {| clientCertificate?: {| publicKey?: {| |}, "type"?: String, encoded?: Binary |}, headers: {| "X-CLIENT-ID": String, "X-CLIENT-SECRET": String, "X-CORRELATION-ID"?: String |}, listenerPath: String, method: String, queryParams: {| |}, queryString: String, relativePath: String, remoteAddress: String, requestPath: String, requestUri: String, scheme: String, uriParams: {| userId: String, subscriptionId: String |}, version: String, localAddress: String |}

types:type.name: auto_282f03ad-8c76-40ea-a2d5-b00629aee4f7_Output-Payload
types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
type auto_282f03ad_8c76_40ea_a2d5_b00629aee4f7_Output_Payload = Array<{ NOTIFICATION_FAILURE_DETAIL: String | Null, CREATION_TIMESTAMP?: String | Null, SUBSCRIPTION_ID?: Number, DELAY_TYPE_FLAG: String, DELAY_TIME?: Number | Null, NOTIFICATION_STATUS: String | Null, ALERT_TRANSACTION_ID?: Number, _?: Any}>

types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0

types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
